summary: Yt Mcp Chapter Card component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「MCP 章节卡片」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-mcp-chapter-card/src/YtMcpChapterCard.tsx` and `remotion/yt-mcp-chapter-card/src/runtime-assets.ts` into your Remotion project, import `YtMcpChapterCard` and `ytMcpChapterCardDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Mcp Chapter Card Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-mcp-chapter-card to my project. Copy both the component file and runtime-assets.ts. Preserve the exported YtMcpChapterCardProps API and register the YtMcpChapterCard composition with the default props.
